label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or technology adoption trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or technology prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness for enterprise deployment

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative comparison against peers or standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework (here: the 9-dimension NT 5.0 planning framework)

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment from Aberdeen analyst or sourced from Microsoft briefings

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities or products

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison against industry standards or peers

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via surveys and interviews

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents including NT 5.0 beta code and Microsoft briefing materials

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analysis drawing on Aberdeen analyst expertise across 11 IT domains

label: Statistical Analysis
definition: Quantitative data analysis with statistical methods

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources
